overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street with towering neon-lit buildings, flying vehicles, and reflective wet pavement. The scene transitions from an open sidewalk with colorful hotel signage to a covered walkway beneath an elevated transit structure, showcasing high-density urban architecture typical of games like Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon hotel signage and reflective pink pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet reflective sidewalk past colorful neon hotel signs and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: police officer in tactical gear walking ahead on the left side of the sidewalk

entered.detail: low concrete barrier painted pink/red separating sidewalk from street
tall grey building with dark rectangular windows
large vertical neon sign spelling HOTEL in multicolored letters
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning the street ahead
futuristic digital billboard displaying food advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open futuristic city sidewalk with wet pink pavement reflecting the surroundings. The camera passes a digital advertisement kiosk and approaches a large neon hotel sign on the left, while flying vehicles pass on the right. A police officer walks ahead on the left as the camera approaches an elevated transit bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated transit line with corporate tower facade

events.description: moves from open street into covered area beneath the elevated transit bridge
lighting shifts from natural daylight to shadowed artificial neon as camera enters underpass

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass alongside a police officer, passing the green Kiroshi tower

notable_agents.action: police officer walking in same direction alongside the camera

entered.detail: tall green corporate building with KIROSHI signage and Japanese text
massive concrete pillar supporting the overhead transit bridge
large planter with mature trees under the overpass
wide concrete staircase with red trim leading up to the Kiroshi building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the elevated transit bridge into a shadowed, sheltered walkway. The massive concrete support pillars dominate the center view while the green Kiroshi corporate tower rises on the left. A police officer continues walking alongside as the environment becomes more enclosed with artificial lighting from neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial underpass with retail storefronts and concrete stairs

events.description: passing the Kiroshi building stairs and transitioning to commercial storefront area with yellow facades

agents.ego_description: walking past concrete stairs and continuing through the covered commercial corridor with yellow storefronts

entered.detail: bright yellow and green commercial storefront with large display windows
open-air multi-level parking structure with visible ramps
large circular pink and blue neon sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the transit bridge, the camera passes wide concrete stairs on the left and moves past the green Kiroshi tower. The environment features bright yellow commercial storefronts with neon signage and a multi-level parking structure on the right. The covered walkway continues forward with wet reflective pavement and scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, neon-lit city sidewalk into a shadowed, enclosed urban corridor beneath a transit structure. It begins by gliding along wet pink pavement that reflects the surrounding glow, passing a digital kiosk and a large hotel sign while flying vehicles streak across the sky. As the camera approaches an elevated transit bridge, the scene shifts from the open air into a sheltered walkway dominated by massive concrete support pillars and the towering green Kiroshi corporate building. The environment then becomes more enclosed and artificial, moving past wide concrete stairs and bright yellow commercial storefronts. Finally, the camera continues forward through the covered passage, passing a multi-level parking structure and scattered pedestrians on the reflective ground.
